category_title: Elementary-aged children with mild/moderate autism and significant language delays
scenario_title: Peer play interaction and verbal requesting in a regulated setting
minimal_context: The student and a peer are playing with grocery store toys on the carpet in a sectioned-off hallway.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We are going to play with the grocery store toys on the carpet for ten minutes. You and your partner can play together.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Picks up a plastic apple) Red apple.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Your partner has the shopping basket.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What can you say to your partner?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Reaches for the basket without asking) Put apple.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: We are going to play with the grocery store toys on the carpet for ten minutes. You and your partner can play together.

STUDENT: (Picks up a plastic apple) Red apple.

TUTOR: Your partner has the shopping basket.

STUDENT: (Looks at the basket) Basket.

TUTOR: What can you say to your partner?

STUDENT: (Reaches for the basket without asking) Put apple.

task.content: Engaging in free play with toys (themes like grocery store, kitchen, doctor) and Attempting to use verbal requests
task.learning_goal: Producing verbal dialogue during play sessions

context.materials: toys arranged on the carpeted floor
context.social_setting: Dyad (peer play) with an interventionist present

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Attempting to use verbal requests during the 10-minute play component
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: produced one or no requests throughout the intervention phase
related_quotes: Child 1A1 and Child 2B3 produce d one or no requests throughout the intervention phase.

behavior_patterns.condition: When the interventionist invited the children to play with the toys arranged on the carpeted floor and engaged in minimal conversation
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: consistent decrease over the baseline sessi ons producing five or fewer com ments at the end of the baseline phase
related_quotes: both partners had a consistent decrease over the baseline sessi ons producing five or fewer com ments at the end of the baseline phase.

behavior_patterns.condition: Producing complex language during play sessions
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: average number of four or more word utterances was unchange d... and there were decreases in the average number of four or mor e word utterances
related_quotes: The average number of four or more word utterances was unchange d from three of the participan ts and there were decreases in the average number of four or mor e word utterances for two of t he participants.
